name: Stir Fried Beef and Broccoli in Oyster Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the flank steak across the grain into very thin slices.
2. Place the sliced meat in a bowl and combine with soy sauce, rice wine, water, and cornstarch. Allow to marinate for at least 10 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, prepare all remaining ingredients.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add the marinated beef to the hot oil and cook, stirring constantly, until it is about 75% cooked through. Remove from the pan and set aside.
6. Scrape any meat residue from the bottom of the pan back into the hot oil if necessary.
7. Return the beef to the pan and add another 2 tablespoons of oil if needed. Heat until shimmering.
8. Add minced garlic, chopped ginger, and green onions to the pan and cook for 30 to 60 seconds, or until fragrant.
9. Stir in the broccoli florets and water. Cover the pan and cook for 3 minutes.
10. Return the beef to the pan and combine well with the sauce mixture.
11. Bring the contents to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer until thickened.
12. Serve hot over steamed rice.
